name: First Florida
description_short: First Florida Credit Union is a member-owned financial institution offering checking, savings, loans, mortgages, and investment services to Florida residents with a focus on personalized customer service.
description_long:
First Florida Credit Union is a not-for-profit, member-owned credit union serving Florida communities with NCUA insurance protection. The institution has established itself as a long-standing financial partner, with members reporting 25+ years of loyalty and consistent service quality. The credit union operates multiple branch locations and maintains an online banking platform for member convenience.

First Florida offers a comprehensive suite of financial products including share accounts (savings), student checking, credit cards, auto loans, mortgages, and investment services through First Florida Investment Services. They provide retirement planning seminars, rollover planning webinars, and financial education through their Financial Wellness Center and "It's a Money Thing" resource platform. The credit union also offers specialized products like the Sand Dollar Savings Club for youth and financial literacy events targeting teenagers and families.

The institution differentiates itself through emphasizing member relationships and service quality. Customer testimonials highlight exceptional staff, faster account opening processes, competitive rates on auto loans compared to traditional banks, and personalized assistance. The credit union positions itself on the "CU Difference"—the member-owned, not-for-profit model—and actively hosts community financial education events including retirement seminars and money management workshops.

As a credit union, First Florida is best suited for Florida residents seeking traditional banking services with potentially lower fees and better rates than commercial banks. However, membership is required, and the organization's website does not clearly detail membership eligibility requirements or fee structures. The investment services page appears to be under development, suggesting some service infrastructure may be transitional.
services: Youth financial literacy programs (Teens & Money simulation)
Financial resource center with articles, videos, and calculators
pros: Member-owned, not-for-profit structure typically offers lower fees and competitive rates
Competitive auto loan rates specifically praised by multiple customers in testimonials
Fast account opening process (customers report setup within minutes)
NCUA insurance protection for member accounts
Comprehensive financial education resources including retirement planning seminars and youth financial literacy programs
Multiple branch locations with extended service hours
Investment services available through First Florida Investment Services with CFP Professional advisors
Online banking and mobile access with Routing #263079014
cons: Membership eligibility requirements are not clearly stated on the website
Investment services page is marked as under development with account access redirected to third-party portal
Limited transparency on fee structures and account minimums compared to competitors
No clear information about loan approval timelines or credit requirements
Website does not specify geographic service area or membership restrictions beyond Florida
best_for: Florida residents seeking lower-cost checking and savings accounts with competitive rates
Borrowers shopping for auto loans with emphasis on relationship-based lending
Members interested in comprehensive financial education and retirement planning support
Families wanting youth financial literacy programs and teen money management resources
diagnosis: First Florida Credit Union is best for Florida residents seeking traditional banking and lending services with member-owned credit union benefits, competitive rates, and strong customer service. The primary caveat is that membership eligibility is not clearly defined on their website, and some digital services appear to be under ongoing development, so prospective members should contact the credit union directly to confirm eligibility and current service availability.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_title: First Florida — Credit Union in Jacksonville, FL | CreditDoc
meta_description: First Florida — NCUA-insured credit union in Jacksonville, FL. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
